content:
✅ Why This Works:
• Connects literature to deep psychological themes.
• Encourages students to self-reflect & engage with their unconscious biases.
• Adds a meta-layer to the learning experience.

📜 5. Streak System – Rewarding Consistency & Offering Redemption

📜 Students now have both:
✔ A Streak System (XP Multipliers for Perfect Performance).
✔ Redemption Quests (To “wipe” failures if they recover).

📜 How Streaks Work
✔ Every consecutive week with no missed assignments = XP multiplier increases.
✔ Missing a week resets the multiplier unless a Redemption Quest is completed.

📜 Redemption Quests for Breaking a Streak
✔ “The Trial of the Fallen Scholar” – Write a 300-word essay analyzing your weakest argument & improving it.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 187 (chunk 187/555)
